mapper.select: SELECT * FROM borrow_records WHERE userId = #{userId} ORDER BY borrow_date DESC
SELECT * FROM borrow_records WHERE userId = #{userId} AND status = 'active'
SELECT * FROM borrow_records WHERE userId = #{userId} AND bookId = #{bookId} AND status = 'active' LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM borrow_records WHERE userId = #{userId} AND status = 'active'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM borrow_records WHERE bookId = #{bookId} AND status = 'active'
SELECT * FROM borrow_records ORDER BY borrow_date DESC
SELECT * FROM borrow_records WHERE userId = #{userId} ORDER BY borrow_date DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT * FROM borrow_records ORDER BY borrow_date DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM borrow_records WHERE userId = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO borrow_records(userId, bookId, bookItemId, borrow_date, due_date, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES(#{userId}, #{bookId}, #{bookItemId}, #{borrowDate}, #{dueDate}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE borrow_records SET return_date=#{returnDate}, status=#{status}, updated_at=NOW() WHERE id=#{id}
UPDATE borrow_records SET due_date=#{dueDate}, renewed=true, updated_at=NOW() WHERE id=#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT DATE_FORMAT(borrow_date, '%Y-%m') as month, COUNT(*) as count FROM borrow_records WHERE borrow_date >= #{since} GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(borrow_date, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY month
SELECT b.id, b.title, b.author, b.isbn, b.categoryId, COUNT(*) as borrowCount FROM borrow_records br JOIN books b ON br.bookId = b.id GROUP BY b.id ORDER BY borrowCount DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM borrow_records WHERE status = 'active'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM borrow_records WHERE status = 'overdue'
SELECT * FROM borrow_records WHERE bookItemId = #{bookItemId} AND status = 'active' LIMIT 1

SELECT id, userId, bookId, bookItemId, borrow_date AS borrowDate, due_date AS dueDate, return_date AS returnDate, status, renewed, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM borrow_records WHERE status = 'active' AND due_date < NOW()
